isomorphism.floating_point: not used by this construction path
isomorphism.golden_sha256: bundle rows are byte-stable JSON with type/repr payloads
isomorphism.ordering: node order and edges(keys=True,data=True) order are compared exactly
isomorphism.rng: not used by this deterministic construction path
isomorphism.tie_breaking: parallel edge key order and duplicate public key fallback are compared exactly
